title: Mob Dollars REFORGED
description: A simple currency mod made for trading, shopping and bartering!
body:
![Mob Dollars REFORGED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea676c5f7aaf63cc27b9e73d316579800133941f.png)
Mob Dollars REFORGED is a simple currency mod made for trading, shopping and barthering with other players insted of the usual diamonds, emeralds and so on.

 

The Mob Dollars Mod is a redone and revamped version of my other mod Creeper Dollars. 

The currency now represents multiple other hostile mobs and adds new machines such as the money printer and similar.

 

The mod adds 9 new bank notes and 5 new coins which are made in their own machines.
![Exchange](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89ccf8485a03f5d139707fbfecd632aca8fc98d8_0.webp)


_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Coin Press

(Coin Press)

![coin press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58649c9fc9b8e859d120d9709055d1ad45cf8dcb_0.webp)

(Blank Press)
![plate press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4fd65ccd3921854908e4c41dfc27587393675af_0.webp)


(Printer and Cash Register)
![printer and cash register](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47337dcb1805c1f5cd5e81997a709379aa20739e_0.webp)
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

This mod is a redone version of my old mob Creeper Dollars which will no longer be updated or maintained.

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Hope you have fun and as always if you have any ideas for the mod, leave them in the comments and I'll try to add them to the mod!

If you find any issues with the mod, please leave them in the comments and I'll try to fix them as soon as possible!

 

Also you can use the mod in any modpacks you make!

 

For Crafting Recipes please use the JEI mod made by mezz or go under the gallery tab.

Also check us out on CurseForge! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-dollars-reforged
